# Getting Started

Welcome! See [[Concepts/Wikilinks#Syntax|wikilink syntax]] and the
[[Concepts/Wikilinks]] page. This points to a [[Nonexistent Note]] which should
render as a broken link.

> [!tip] Pro tip
> You can use **callouts** just like in Obsidian.

> [!warning]
> This is a warning callout with a default title.

## Tasks

- [ ] An unfinished task
- [x] A finished task

## Code

```js
console.log("hello from mdsite");
```

## Table

| Feature | Status |
| ------- | ------ |
| Links   | ✅     |
| Search  | ⏳     |

## Image embed

![[diagram.svg]]

## Math

Inline math like $E = mc^2$ renders with KaTeX. Display math too:

$$
\int_0^\infty e^{-x^2}\,dx = \frac{\sqrt{\pi}}{2}
$$
